chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No.S-244 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 02-12-2025. Mr. Sikander Ali Kolachi advocate for the applicant alongwith applicant. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant P.G a/w Inspector A.R.Rahu SHO P.S Dano Dhandal. = In compliance of order, SHO P.S Dano Dandhal has filed his report alongwith certain documents, which is taken on record. Alleged detainee Mst. Firdous has appeared and on query admits that she has contracted marriage with applicant Khuda Bux by exercising her right of free will and now she wants to go with her husband/ applicant. Father of alleged detainee namely Mubarak has appeared and submits that alleged detainee has already married with another person; which has been denied by alleged detainee Mst. Firdous. Since purpose of filing this application has been achieved, therefore, alleged detainee Mst. Firdous is allowed to go with her husband/ applicant Khuda Bux. Official respondents are directed to provide protection to alleged detainee. In view of above instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE *Saleem*
